# Processing Statement (PS) - Amend the back link on check your answers page of the journey

Description

## Background

Currently the back link on /check-your-information page on the PS journey always navigates the user back to /what-export-destination page. The user should be navigated to /progress instead as this is the prior page in the journey.

## User Story

As an exporter
I want to be directed to the progress page when I press the Back button on the /check-your-information page of my PS journey
So that I am directed to the preceding page of the journey

## Acceptance Criteria

Scenario 1 - Selecting the back button on check your information
Given I have navigated to the /check-your-information page of my PS journey
When I select the back link
Then I will be directed to /progress page

Scenario 2 - Selecting the back button on check your information for a cloned document
Given I have navigated to the /check-your-information page of my PS journey

And it is a cloned document
When I select the back link
Then I will be directed to /progress page
